features.name: parameterized multi-bit shift register
features.description: Code should include a multi-bit register with parameterized width used in a shift register feedback pattern where the register value is concatenated with a single-bit input and assigned back to itself

features.name: MSB bit-select output from multi-bit register
features.description: Code should include a continuous assignment that extracts a single bit (MSB) from a parameterized-width register as an output

features.name: register with parameterized width range declaration
features.description: Code should include a register declared with a width derived from a parameter using a descending bit range expression
